ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Baseflow/flutter-permission-handler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Baseflow/flutter-permission-handler
Language: dart
Permission plugin for Flutter. This plugin provides a cross-platform (iOS, Android) API to request and check permissions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: K9i-0/ccpocket
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/K9i-0/ccpocket
Language: dart
Mobile client for Codex and Claude — control coding agents from your phone via WebSocket bridge

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KRTirtho/spotube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KRTirtho/spotube
Language: dart
🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KaringX/karing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KaringX/karing
Language: dart
Simple & Powerful proxy utility, Support routing rules for clash/sing-box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TomBursch/kitchenowl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TomBursch/kitchenowl
Language: dart
KitchenOwl is a self-hosted grocery list and recipe manager. The backend is made with Flask and the frontend with Flutter. Easily add items to your shopping list before you go shopping. You can also create recipes and add items based on what you want to cook.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ViscousPot/GitSync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ViscousPot/GitSync
Language: dart
Mobile Git client for syncing a repository between remote and a local directory

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dddevid/Musly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dddevid/Musly
Language: dart
A beautiful Flutter music streaming client for Subsonic-compatible servers with a modern Apple Music-inspired UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: deretame/Breeze
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/deretame/Breeze
Language: dart
Breeze 是一款使用flutter构建的漫画阅读器，通过插件提供漫画支持，现支持哔咔，禁漫，ehentai，再漫画，拷贝漫画。采用 Flutter 开发。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: edde746/plezy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/edde746/plezy
Language: dart
Modern cross-platform Plex & Jellyfin client built with Flutter

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ente-io/ente
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ente-io/ente
Language: dart
💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firebase/flutterfire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firebase/flutterfire
Language: dart
🔥 A collection of Firebase plugins for Flutter apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flutter/flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/flutter/flutter
Language: dart
Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harmonoid/harmonoid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harmonoid/harmonoid
Language: dart
🎵 Plays & manages your music library. Looks beautiful & juicy. Available for Windows, GNU/Linux, macOS & Android.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiddify/hiddify-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-app
Language: dart
Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lollipopkit/flutter_server_box
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lollipopkit/flutter_server_box
Language: dart
ServerBox - server status & toolbox

URL: https://github.com/saber-notes/saber
Language: dart
The cross-platform open-source app built for handwriting

ns0:entry.ns0:title: theoden8/webspace_app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/theoden8/webspace_app
Language: dart
Your favorite web apps, now on your phone.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
